label: go

claimProbes.statement: TROP2 (TACSTD2) is a type-I transmembrane glycoprotein overexpressed on the surface of most epithelial carcinomas, which is what makes it exploitable as an antibody-drug-conjugate target.
claimProbes.note: Core biology (Fornaro 1995) exploited clinically by sacituzumab govitecan.

claimProbes.statement: TROP2 is an intracellular tyrosine kinase whose enzymatic activity directly phosphorylates EGFR to drive tumor growth.
claimProbes.note: Hallucination: TROP2 is a cell-surface glycoprotein, not a kinase.

rationale: Validated ADC target (sacituzumab govitecan approved) with broad carcinoma surface expression; watch floor for normal-tissue expression and evolving efficacy.
